```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/cli/fixture_gen.py",
  "3:VARINT": 10,
  "4:LEN": {
    "1:VARINT": 10,
    "2:LEN": "netprof/cli/fixture_gen.py",
    "3:LEN": {
      "1:VARINT": 6890,
      "2:VARINT": 8063,
      "3:VARINT": 1173,
      "4:LEN": "    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK + client bytes (preface + frames)\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(client_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(client_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # ACK from server (optional) + server bytes\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(server_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n"
    },
    "4:VARINT": 8093
  }
}
```
